goal: Replace the GitHub issue search in discord_triage with a Coral MCP AIAgent, remove github_sync_daily, and clean up Qdrant setup
summary: Phase 1 completed: removed github_sync_daily flow and github_issues Qdrant references; added Coral AIAgent step with StreamableHttpMcpClient to discord_triage; replaced all hardcoded API keys with KV/secret references and added baseUrl; cleaned up setup_qdrant.py to only create discord_unmatched.
stepSummaries:
1. Delete kestra/flows/github_sync_daily.yaml and remove all references to github_issues from discord_triage.yaml [verified]
  2. Add a Coral AIAgent step to discord_triage that searches GitHub issues for the report summary using github.search_issues [verified]
  3. Update OpenAI provider configs in all flows to use baseUrl from kv('OPENAI_BASE_URL') and apiKey from secret('OPENAI_API_KEY') [verified]
  4. Update scripts/setup_qdrant.py to only create discord_unmatched collection [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Steps 1-4 all had real file diffs and bash verify commands that passed. Step 1 used test/grep to confirm deletion. Step 2 used grep to confirm StreamableHttpMcpClient and github.search_issues presence. Step 3 used grep to confirm baseUrl/KV and no hardcoded keys. Step 4 used grep and ast.parse to confirm cleanup.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All 4 step verifications returned PASS. File diffs exist in kestra/flows/discord_triage.yaml, kestra/flows/triage_draft_alert.yaml, scripts/setup_qdrant.py. github_sync_daily.yaml deleted.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to replace GitHub issue search in discord_triage with Coral MCP, remove github_sync_daily, and clean up Qdrant setup. The outputs are: (1) new coral_search AIAgent + parse_coral steps in discord_triage, (2) deleted github_sync_daily.yaml, (3) no remaining hardcoded API keys, (4) setup_qdrant.py only creates discord_unmatched.
gateVerdicts.evidence: discord_triage.yaml now contains StreamableHttpMcpClient and github.search_issues. github_sync_daily.yaml is gone. scripts/setup_qdrant.py has only discord_unmatched.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. All planned changes in Phase 1 were completed. The triage_draft_alert.yaml OpenAI provider was also updated as part of step 3 even though it wasn't explicitly listed in the phase description, because it was required by the success criteria of having no hardcoded keys.
gateVerdicts.evidence: triage_draft_alert.yaml provider updated with baseUrl and apiKey from inputs. No remaining work items.
